name: GetWithHeaders

aliases.name: Headers
aliases.comment: Headers are represented as a list of key-value tuples.

values.name: get
values.comment:
Given headers and a body, return an HTTP GET task
    that produces headers and a decoded body.
values.type: Decoder value -> Headers -> String -> Task Error ( Headers, value )

values.name: postJson
values.comment:
Post Json data with Content-Type set to application/json
    You may also send and receive other headers.

    Use the Json.Encode package to convert your body into Json.Value
values.type: Decoder value -> Headers -> String -> Value -> Task Error ( Headers, value )
